# EduFlow - Integrated School Operations & LMS

EduFlow is an all-in-one SaaS web application that integrates learning management (LMS) with daily school operations, finance tracking, staff attendance, and parent monitoring.

## System Overview
- **Type:** Responsive Web Application (SaaS Dashboard)
- **Tech Stack:** Next.js 14, React 18, Prisma ORM, SQLite Database
- **Target Audience:** School Administrators, Teachers, Students, and Parents

## Core Modules & Features
- **Admin Dashboard:** Manage users, teachers, classes, and view cashflow logs (incoming/outgoing funds) and staff attendance.
- **Guru Dashboard:** Upload materials, assign tasks, manage student attendance grids, and input Tahfidz Quran memorization records.
- **Siswa Dashboard:** Download study files, submit class assignments digitally, track personal attendance rate, and monitor Quran memorization progress.
- **Orang Tua Dashboard:** Select child profile, monitor child's daily presence, track pending homework, inspect academic scores, and read Tahfidz logs with teachers' feedback.
